summary: Iteration 8 testing complete. All P0 fixes verified: (1) Frontend compiles without Webpack errors - usePageView hook correctly placed before conditional return in LandingPage.js, (2) Login works without 429 errors - brute force threshold increased to 10 attempts, (3) Analytics tracking working - page_view, login_success, login_fail events stored correctly. All 16 backend tests passed, all frontend flows working.

integration_issues.issue: 400/401 errors in console when user profile is incomplete - expected behavior, not a bug

passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns 200
Backend: Login with valid credentials (admin@rinkosh.com / Admin@123) returns 200
Backend: Invalid credentials return 401 (not 429)
Backend: 6+ failed login attempts still return 401 (no 429 rate limiting)
Backend: Valid login works after failed attempts
Backend: POST /api/analytics/event stores events correctly
Backend: page_view events tracked
Backend: login_success events tracked
Backend: login_fail events tracked
Backend: event_type required validation works
Backend: Register endpoint works
Backend: Logout endpoint works
Backend: /auth/me requires authentication
Backend: /auth/me returns user data when authenticated
Backend: OTP request endpoint works
Backend: Admin events endpoint returns analytics data
Frontend: Landing page loads without Webpack errors
Frontend: All landing page sections render (navbar, hero, stats, features, how-it-works, trust, our-story, savings-stats, emi-calculator, cta, footer)
Frontend: Language toggle (EN/HI) works - Hindi text visible when switched
Frontend: Dark mode toggle works
Frontend: EMI Calculator renders on landing page
Frontend: Login page loads with Password/OTP tabs
Frontend: Login with valid credentials redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard loads with all 5 tabs (Recommendations, My Leads, Credit Builder, AI Advisor, EMI Calculator)
Frontend: Dashboard EMI Calculator tab works with sliders and calculations
Frontend: Onboarding page loads with loan type selection
critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingPage.js is missing usePageView('onboarding') hook - consider adding for complete analytics coverage
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 fixes verified. usePageView hook placement fix in LandingPage.js working. 429 rate limiting relaxed to 10 attempts. Analytics events being tracked correctly. Dashboard shows 'Complete your profile' message for admin user since onboarding not completed. The 400/401 console errors on dashboard are expected when profile is incomplete.
